issues.sample: The contact owns a 2019 Chrysler 300. The contact received notification of NHTSA Campaign Number: 24V198000 (Air Bags) however, the part to do the recall repair was not yet available. The contact stated that the manufacturer had exceeded a reasonable amount of time for the recall

narrative.headline: What 2019 Chrysler 300 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 59 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (37% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
